title: PromotionReceiptPayload
description: Payload for promotion_receipt family v1. Durable receipt of a shared intake outcome (accepted, rejected, or duplicate-reconciled).

related_artifact_ref.description: Canonical reference to the artifact this receipt covers.

intake_outcome.description: Explicit outcome of the shared intake attempt. Must never be ambiguous.

shared_record_ref.description: Reference to the shared canonical record if accepted or duplicate_reconciled. Null for rejected.

received_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the intake outcome was determined.

idempotency_key.description: Idempotency key of the artifact this receipt covers.

outcome_summary.description: Plain-language explanation of the intake outcome.

rejection_class.description: Classification of the rejection reason. Must be non-null when intake_outcome is 'rejected'.

retry_allowed.description: Whether the local side may retry after a rejection.

producer_identity.description: Identity of the producer as seen by the intake side.
